lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਜਪਿ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲਾ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: govid govid govid jap mukh aoojalaa paradhaan |
lines.english: Meditating on God, chanting Govind, Govind, Govind, your face shall be radiant; you shall be famous and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕੋ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਜੁਗ ਜੋਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape hee sidh saadhiko too aape hee jug jogeea |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Siddha and the seeker; You Yourself are the Yoga and the Yogi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak gur govind har jit mil har paaeaa naam |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Guru is the Lord God, the Lord of the Universe; meeting Him, you shall obtain the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਰਸ ਰਸੀਅੜਾ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਭੋਗ ਭੋਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: too aape hee ras raseearraa too aape hee bhog bhogeea |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Taster of tastes; You Yourself are the Enjoyer of pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੁ ਹੋਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: too aape aap varatadaa too aape kareh su hogeea |
lines.english: You Yourself are All-pervading; whatever You do comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਧੰਨੁ ਧਨੋੁ ਧੰਨ ਧੰਨ ਧਨੋ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਲਗ ਬੁਲੋਗੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat satigur dhan dhano dhan dhan dhano jit mil har bulag bulogeea |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed, blessed, blessed, blessed is the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation of the True Guru. Join them - speak and chant the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਹਹੁ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲਤ ਸਭਿ ਪਾਪ ਲਹੋਗੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh kahahu mukhahu har har hare har har hare har bolat sabh paap lahogeea |1|
lines.english: Let everyone chant together the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Haray, Har, Har, Haray; chanting Har, all sins are washed away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har har har naam hai guramukh paavai koe |
lines.english: Har, Har, Har, Har is the Name of the Lord; rare are those who, as Gurmukh, obtain it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਨਾਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਢੈ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mamataa naas hoe duramat kadtai dhoe |
lines.english: Egotism and possessiveness are eradicated, and evil-mindedness is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har aape aap deaal har aape kare su hoe |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is Merciful; whatever the Lord Himself does, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak anadin gun ucharai jin kau dhur likhiaa hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who is blessed with such pre-ordained destiny chants the Lord's Praises, night and day. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har aape aap varatadaa har jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is All-pervading. There is no other as Great as the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo har prabh bhaavai so theeai jo har prabh kare su hoe |
lines.english: Whatever pleases the Lord God's Will comes to pass; whatever the Lord God does is done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈਆ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kinai na paaeea beant prabhoo har soe |
lines.english: No one can appraise His Value; the Lord God is Endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਆ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh har saalaahiaa tan man seetal hoe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, as Gurmukh, praise the Lord; your body and mind shall be cooled and soothed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਜੋਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਜਗਜੀਵਨਾ ਤੂ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਰੰਗਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jot teree jagajeevanaa too ghatt ghatt har rang ranganaa |
lines.english: You are the Light of all, the Life of the World; You imbue each and every heart with Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਤੂ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh dhiaaveh tudh mere preetamaa too sat sat purakh niranjanaa |
lines.english: All meditate on You, O my Beloved; You are the True, True Primal Being, the Immaculate Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਭਿਖਾਰੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਚਹਿ ਸਭ ਮੰਗ ਮੰਗਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik daataa sabh jagat bhikhaareea har jaacheh sabh mang manganaa |
lines.english: The One is the Giver; the whole world is the beggar. All the beggars beg for His Gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਤੂਹੈ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਚੰਗ ਚੰਗਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sevak tthaakur sabh toohai toohai guramatee har chang changanaa |
lines.english: You are the servant, and You are the Lord and Master of all. Through the Guru's Teachings, we are ennobled and uplifted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਹਹੁ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਰਿਖੀਕੇਸੁ ਹਰੇ ਰਿਖੀਕੇਸੁ ਹਰੇ ਜਿਤੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਭ ਫਲ ਫਲਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh kahahu mukhahu rikheekes hare rikheekes hare jit paaveh sabh fal falanaa |2|
lines.english: Let everyone say that the Lord is the Master of the senses, the Master of all faculties; through Him, we obtain all fruits and rewards. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaae man har daragah paaveh maan |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛਹਿ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਲਗੈ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo ichheh so fal paaeisee gurasabadee lagai dhiaan |
lines.english: You shall obtain the fruits that you desire, focusing your meditation on the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਸਭਿ ਕਟੀਅਹਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਚੁਕੈ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh paap sabh katteeeh haumai chukai gumaan |
lines.english: All your sins and mistakes shall be wiped away, and you shall be rid of egotism and pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh kamal vigasiaa sabh aatam braham pachhaan |
lines.english: The heart-lotus of the Gurmukh blossoms forth, recognizing God within every soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har kirapaa dhaar prabh jan naanak jap har naam |1|
lines.english: O Lord God, please shower Your Mercy upon servant Nanak, that he may chant the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam pavit hai naam japat dukh jaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is Sacred and Immaculate. Chanting the Naam, pain is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin man vasiaa aae |
lines.english: God comes to abide in the minds of those who have such pre-ordained destiny.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਜਨ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਮਨਿ ਪਤੀਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai bhaanai kinai na paaeo jan vekhahu man pateeae |
lines.english: No one finds the Lord by his own will; see this, and satisfy your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਨ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai jo chalai tin daalad dukh leh jaae |
lines.english: Those who walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru are rid of pain and poverty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸਨ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਾਗੇ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak daasan daas hai jo satigur laage paae |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is the slave of the slave of those who fall at the Feet of the True Guru. ||2||
